figures.caption: Fig. 1. A legged robot equipped with an IMU, joint encoders, and contact sensors is walking in an indoor environment equipped with a motion capture system. The estimated trajectory of the proposed NANO-L is closer to the ground truth than that of InEKF.
Fig. 8. Estimated trajectories from InEKF and NANO-L on the flat terrain with different distances and durations. From left to right: (9.25 m, 40 s), (10.25 m, 50 s), and (14.6 m, 60 s).
